rationale: The LLM's demonstrated capability at web exploitation transfers moderately to execution phase through code generation and obfuscation techniques. While LLMs excel at generating PowerShell scripts and suggesting evasion methods, the execution phase requires environmental adaptation and real-time EDR response that LLMs cannot directly observe. The estimated 8 percentage point median uplift from the 50% baseline reflects meaningful assistance in reducing technical research time while acknowledging that environmental defenses and debugging remain primary bottlenecks.
